mapper.sql: id, location, sub_location as subLocation, name, level, weather, time, price_1 as price1, price_2 as price2, price_3 as price3, price_4 as price4, price_5 as price5, size, image_url as imageUrl, event_name as eventName

id, location, sub_location as subLocation, name, level, weather, time, price_1 as price1, price_2 as price2, price_3 as price3, price_4 as price4, price_5 as price5, type, image_url as imageUrl, event_name as eventName

id, location, sub_location as subLocation, name, level, weather, time, price_1 as price1, price_2 as price2, price_3 as price3, price_4 as price4, price_5 as price5, image_url as imageUrl, event_name as eventName
id, name, location, description, favorite_food as favoriteFood, favorite_weather as favoriteWeather, image_url as imageUrl, event_name as eventName
id, name, level, ingredients, buy_price as buyPrice, price_1 as price1, price_2 as price2, price_3 as price3, price_4 as price4, price_5 as price5, image_url as imageUrl, event_name as eventName

id, name, price_1 as price1, price_2 as price2, price_3 as price3, price_4 as price4, price_5 as price5, level, growth_time as growthTime, seed_buy_price as seedBuyPrice, seed_sell_price as seedSellPrice, image_url as imageUrl, event_name as eventName
id, name, location, price, energy, image_url as imageUrl, event_name as eventName, show_on_map as showOnMap
mapper.select: SELECT FROM fish_collections ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT FROM bird_collections ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT FROM bug_collections ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT FROM animal_collections ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT FROM cooking_collections ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT FROM flower_collections ORDER BY level, name
SELECT FROM crop_collections ORDER BY level, name
SELECT FROM forageable_collections ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT FROM fish_collections WHERE name = #{name}
SELECT FROM bug_collections WHERE name = #{name}
SELECT FROM bird_collections WHERE name = #{name}
SELECT FROM animal_collections WHERE name = #{name}
SELECT FROM cooking_collections WHERE name = #{name}
SELECT FROM flower_collections WHERE name = #{name}
SELECT FROM crop_collections WHERE name = #{name}
SELECT FROM forageable_collections WHERE name = #{name}

SELECT ci.id, ci.cooking_id AS cookingId, ci.ingredient_name AS ingredientName, ci.quantity, ci.item_type AS itemType, ci.item_id AS itemId, CASE ci.item_type WHEN 'crop' THEN (SELECT image_url FROM crop_collections WHERE id = ci.item_id) WHEN 'forageable' THEN (SELECT image_url FROM forageable_collections WHERE id = ci.item_id) WHEN 'fish' THEN (SELECT image_url FROM fish_collections WHERE id = ci.item_id) WHEN 'bug' THEN (SELECT image_url FROM bug_collections WHERE id = ci.item_id) WHEN 'bird' THEN (SELECT image_url FROM bird_collections WHERE id = ci.item_id) WHEN 'flower' THEN (SELECT image_url FROM flower_collections WHERE id = ci.item_id) ELSE NULL END AS imageUrl FROM cooking_ingredients ci WHERE ci.cooking_id = #{cookingId} ORDER BY ci.id ASC

SELECT ci.id, ci.cooking_id AS cookingId, ci.ingredient_name AS ingredientName, ci.quantity, ci.item_type AS itemType, ci.item_id AS itemId, NULL AS imageUrl FROM cooking_ingredients ci ORDER BY ci.cooking_id, ci.id ASC
SELECT FROM fish_collections WHERE location = #{location} AND name != #{excludeName} ORDER BY level LIMIT 6
SELECT FROM bug_collections WHERE location = #{location} AND name != #{excludeName} ORDER BY level LIMIT 6
SELECT FROM bird_collections WHERE location = #{location} AND name != #{excludeName} ORDER BY level LIMIT 6
SELECT FROM animal_collections WHERE location = #{location} AND name != #{excludeName} ORDER BY id LIMIT 6
SELECT FROM forageable_collections WHERE location = #{location} AND name != #{excludeName} ORDER BY id LIMIT 6
SELECT FROM fish_collections WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT FROM bug_collections WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT FROM bird_collections WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT FROM animal_collections WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT FROM cooking_collections WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT FROM flower_collections WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT FROM crop_collections WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT FROM forageable_collections WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT count(*) FROM fish_collections
SELECT count(*) FROM bird_collections
SELECT count(*) FROM bug_collections
SELECT count(*) FROM animal_collections
SELECT count(*) FROM cooking_collections
SELECT count(*) FROM flower_collections
SELECT count(*) FROM crop_collections
SELECT count(*) FROM forageable_collections
